name: fable-mode
description: A documentation-only Codex plugin that adds one explicit $fable-mode skill for intent locking, visible routing, grounding, capability, depth, and delegation control.

interface.longDescription: Fable Mode is an unofficial, original, provider-neutral Codex skill for explicit task framing, output-form selection, visible route contracts, grounding stop gates, capability stop gates, depth control, optional delegation budgeting, and concise final reporting. It is documentation-only and adds no tools, servers, hooks, network calls, dependencies, or telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Use $fable-mode to lock output type and expose route when warranted.
Use $fable-mode to fix this without over-scoping.
Use $fable-mode to cap tools, delegation, and verification.
